mapper.insert: insert into campaigns (id, name, status, target_audience_segment, start_date, end_date, message_title, message_body, message_image_url, message_cta_text, fulfillment_action_type, created_by, archived, created_at, updated_at, display_placement, frequency_cap_type, frequency_cap_max_impressions, delivery_start_time, delivery_end_time, personalization_tokens, remind_later_deferral_days, fulfillment_workflow_url, decline_suppression, confirmation_message, audience_rules, channel, priority, tags, ab_test_enabled) values (#{campaign.id}, #{campaign.name}, #{campaign.status}, #{campaign.targetAudienceSegment}, #{campaign.startDate, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, #{campaign.endDate, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, #{campaign.messageTitle}, #{campaign.messageBody}, #{campaign.messageImageUrl}, #{campaign.messageCtaText}, #{campaign.fulfillmentActionType}, #{campaign.createdBy}, #{campaign.archived}, #{campaign.createdAt, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, #{campaign.updatedAt, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, #{campaign.displayPlacement}, #{campaign.frequencyCapType}, #{campaign.frequencyCapMaxImpressions}, #{campaign.deliveryStartTime}, #{campaign.deliveryEndTime}, #{campaign.personalizationTokens}, #{campaign.remindLaterDeferralDays}, #{campaign.fulfillmentWorkflowUrl}, #{campaign.declineSuppression}, #{campaign.confirmationMessage}, #{campaign.audienceRules}, #{campaign.channel}, #{campaign.priority}, #{campaign.tags}, #{campaign.abTestEnabled})
mapper.select:
select * from campaigns
archived = 0
order by created_at desc

select * from campaigns
status = #{status}
and archived = 0
order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update campaigns set name = #{campaign.name}, status = #{campaign.status}, target_audience_segment = #{campaign.targetAudienceSegment}, start_date = #{campaign.startDate, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, end_date = #{campaign.endDate, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, message_title = #{campaign.messageTitle}, message_body = #{campaign.messageBody}, message_image_url = #{campaign.messageImageUrl}, message_cta_text = #{campaign.messageCtaText}, fulfillment_action_type = #{campaign.fulfillmentActionType}, archived = #{campaign.archived}, updated_at = #{campaign.updatedAt, typeHandler=io.spring.infrastructure.mybatis.DateTimeHandler}, display_placement = #{campaign.displayPlacement}, frequency_cap_type = #{campaign.frequencyCapType}, frequency_cap_max_impressions = #{campaign.frequencyCapMaxImpressions}, delivery_start_time = #{campaign.deliveryStartTime}, delivery_end_time = #{campaign.deliveryEndTime}, personalization_tokens = #{campaign.personalizationTokens}, remind_later_deferral_days = #{campaign.remindLaterDeferralDays}, fulfillment_workflow_url = #{campaign.fulfillmentWorkflowUrl}, decline_suppression = #{campaign.declineSuppression}, confirmation_message = #{campaign.confirmationMessage}, audience_rules = #{campaign.audienceRules}, channel = #{campaign.channel}, priority = #{campaign.priority}, tags = #{campaign.tags}, ab_test_enabled = #{campaign.abTestEnabled} where id = #{campaign.id}
